name: PARennial Golf - West Loop
address: 1335 W Lake St Ste 103, Chicago, IL 60607
about: PARennial Golf offers a premium indoor golf experience in Chicago with state-of-the-art Trackman technology. The facilities provide an environment designed for serious practice and play, featuring high-fidelity course recreations and professional-grade simulators. With locations in Lincoln Park, West Loop, and Wicker Park, the venue caters to golfers of all levels, offering flexible booking options, 24/7 access for members, and PGA professional instruction to enhance gameplay and skill development.
why_golfers_like_it: Real-time simulator bay availability and walk-in play options
24/7 unlimited access for members with no booking requirements
PGA professional instruction tailored to all skill levels
High-fidelity Trackman technology with accurate shot data

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed
No bar service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor technology with accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is likely allowed as no bar service is mentioned, though food service isn't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take about 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, PARennial Golf welcomes junior golfers and offers instruction programs for youth.
